name: @repo/email
description: Self-hosted email - iRedMail (engine) + Zero Email (server + client). Orchestrator package: install and run server + client together.

scripts.postinstall: cd server && bun install && cd ../client && bun install
scripts.install:all: bun run resolve-catalogs && bun run install:server && bun run install:client
scripts.dev: bash -c '(cd server && bun run dev) & (cd client && bun run dev) & trap "kill 0" EXIT INT TERM; wait'
scripts.lint: (cd server && bun run lint) && (cd client && bun run lint)
